The scoreboard lists 'PORTILLO' in the first position with a time of '53.70'.
The scoreboard lists 'MCPHERSON' in the second position with a time of '53.96'.
The scoreboard lists 'RUSSELL' in the third position with a time of '54.01'.

spatial: The woman in the pink top is in the foreground, positioned in front of the stadium seating. The scoreboard overlay is located at the bottom of the screen, below the woman. The person in dark clothing is to the left of the woman in the background.
